query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invoice_sla_overrides (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  work_order_number VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  reason VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'Manual override',
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_wo (work_order_number)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user LTmfYgwcE1mg9cB.root --database Jdx475rzuNGCt88odzGLDy --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS invoice_sla_overrides (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  work_order_number VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  reason VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT 'Manual override',
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_wo (work_order_number)
);
